arts.ttl: Salah sets yet another Premier League record at West Ham
arts.sum: Mohamed Salah is having a season for the history books at Liverpool. The Egyptian’s incredible individual campaign has continued at West Ham this afternoon, where Salah has added another goal and assist to his hauls for the campaign. Salah’s sharpshooting has fired Liverpool into a 3-0 lead at half-time. Having last week set a new […] The post Salah sets yet another Premier League record at West Ham first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Liverpool suffer Joe Gomez injury blow as Arne Slot loses another defender
arts.sum: Joe Gomez was substituted with a muscle injury in the first half of Liverpool's Premier League match against Manchester United

arts.ttl: 'Diaz takes full advantage!' | Liverpool edge in front at West Ham
arts.sum: Luis Diaz takes full advantage of a fortuitous bounce as Liverpool edge in front at West Ham.

arts.ttl: LIVE: Liverpool look to extend their Premier League lead against West Ham
arts.sum: Premier League leaders Liverpool head to the London Stadium to face West Ham. ESPN has live updates.

arts.ttl: Analysis: How Salah led 'hungry' Liverpool to victory
arts.sum: Match of the Day pundit Alan Shearer praises Liverpool's "incredibly hungry" attack after Arne Slot's side beat Leicester 3-1 at Anfield to extend their lead at the top of the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Liverpool set asking price for South American star amid interest from Euro giants
arts.sum: Liverpool midfielder Alexis Mac Allister is reportedly a target for Real Madrid. The 26-year-old Argentine international has been a key player for Liverpool, and there is no doubt that he would be an excellent signing for the Spanish outfit as well. Real Madrid need to start planning for a future without Luka Modrić and the […] The post Liverpool set asking price for South American star amid interest from Euro giants appeared first on CaughtOffside.
